creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello Jim, 

There are the following problems with your patch: 

* Don't use hardcoded /usr/local in your patch. I have modified CONFIGURE_ENV instead 
* If you link against libexecinfo you have so specify it as dependency 

I have uploaded my diff: 

http://people.freebsd.org/~arved/stuff/zabbix.diff 

Please approve!
